content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

August 26, 2011


Theodore R. Meriam
990 Oak Street
Clayton, CA 94517

Re:     Your Request for Advice
        Our file No. W-11-127

Dear Mr. Meriam:

        This letter responds to your request for advice regarding the conflict-of-interest
provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").¹ On August 11, 2011 and August 17, 2011,
I called you to clarify your question and gain further information. As we have not heard from
you, we are withdrawing your request for advice. You are welcome to write again if you are
still in need of assistance.

        If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

                                                        Sincerely,

                                                        Zackery P. Morazzini
                                                        General Counsel

                                                        [signature]
                                                By:     Heather M. Rowan
                                                        Counsel, Legal Division

HMR:jgl




___________________________
¹ The Political Reform Act is contained in Government Code Sections 81000 through 91014. All statutory
references are to the Government Code, unless otherwise indicated. The regulations of the Fair Political Practices
Commission are contained in Sections 18110 through 18997 of Title 2 of the California Code of Regulations. All
regulatory references are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations, unless otherwise indicated.


≡

sections.question_synthetic: The requestor sought advice regarding conflict-of-interest provisions under the Political Reform Act, but the FPPC was unable to obtain clarification of the specific question despite multiple attempts to contact the requestor.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC is withdrawing the request for advice due to lack of responsiveness from the requestor after two attempted clarification calls, but invites resubmission if assistance is still needed.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is a withdrawal letter with no formal QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections. The document indicates the FPPC called the requestor twice (August 11 and 17, 2011) to clarify the question but did not receive a response, prompting the withdrawal.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: The requestor sought advice regarding conflict-of-interest provisions under the Political Reform Act, but the FPPC was unable to obtain clarification of the specific question despite multiple attempts to contact the requestor.

CONCLUSION: The FPPC is withdrawing the request for advice due to lack of responsiveness from the requestor after two attempted clarification calls, but invites resubmission if assistance is still needed.
